[2019-08-31 20:52] velizar_ (Name): yeah, so we're only disagreeing on the probabilities of hacking
[2019-08-31 20:52] velizar_ (Name): which is hard to agree on
[2019-08-31 20:53] masn6811 (Masne98888): also, id like to qualify this statement in that the value of the false negative is not the marginal advantage of banning them to not banning them, but the marginal advantage of banning them compared to the damage they'd do before we have more evidence to ban them
[2019-08-31 20:54] masn6811 (Masne98888): for example, say that someone has an 80% of being a map hacker, and would do 1 point of damage if left unbanned, while it would do 3 points of damage if falsely banned
